availability.gemini: unavailable: unsupported Gemini Code Assist client
availability.codex: aborted: repository discovery escaped intended worktree scope
availability.openrouter_north_mini_code: low health: malformed or tool-diverted output
availability.openrouter_deepseek_v4_flash_free: available intermittently; one CLEAN, later timeout

openrouter_verification.scope: embedded plan and Discord requirement excerpts only; no credentials or private user data

resolved_findings: Replace WebView/env token transport with native capture plus one-shot OS pipe/handle injection.
Assign exact FR-DISCORD-RT-1-7 implementation and test trace.
Define atomic generation activation, fsync/rename ownership, cache bounds and corruption precedence.
Make Agent the sole inbox-cache writer and Shell a read-only watcher.
Scope session/history by binding/guild/channel/user and dedupe by binding/message.
Define write-ahead partial-reply behavior that prefers omission over duplicate send.
Add permission-overwrite discovery, rate-limit, participation/authority Cartesian tests.
Ban message/document/search content from diagnostics and persistent WebView storage.
Separate code-migration, automated E2E, and mandatory live Discord acceptance gates.
Add cross-session shared-file lock plus acknowledgment and latest-HEAD diff gates.
dismissed_unconfirmed_findings: Development coordination lock was incorrectly conflated with Agent runtime stop state.
Bounded dedupe constants were incorrectly treated as contradictory to explicit corruption reset.
Shell memory-only one-shot REST history was incorrectly treated as an inbox write despite an explicit no-write contract.
